mapper.select: SELECT composition_id, product_id, item_id, quantity, created_at, updated_at FROM product_compositions
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_compositions (product_id, item_id, quantity) VALUES (#{productId}, #{itemId}, #{quantity})
mapper.update: UPDATE product_compositions SET product_id = #{productId}, item_id = #{itemId}, quantity = #{quantity}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE composition_id = #{compositionId}
